underlying_goal: Compare their frontend project (the-ai-U) against a reference project (airi) using an agent team, then create a detailed optimization plan based on the gap analysis
friction_detail: Agent team shutdown was messy - took many rounds of idle notifications and repeated shutdown messages before all 5 agents finally terminated, consuming significant session time
brief_summary: User wanted a team of expert agents to analyze their frontend's gap vs airi and then create an optimization plan; the gap analysis was fully delivered across 5 dimensions with detailed reports, and the optimization plan was being written when the user interrupted
